title: First sparks — three ways a glow mark could feel
prompt: Round 1: three divergent takes on a glowing mark. Pick what pulls, note what to keep, remix what should collide.

options.label: Alpha
options.description: A filament bulb — warm, literal glow.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><circle cx="50" cy="42" r="22" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M42 66h16v8a8 8 0 0 1-16 0z" fill="#a855f7"/><path d="M50 32v14M42 38l16 8M58 38l-16 8" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/></svg>

options.label: Beta
options.description: A neon ring with a breakout arc — energy escaping the frame.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="28" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="6" stroke-dasharray="132 44"/><path d="M72 28l14-14" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

options.label: Gamma
options.description: Stacked brainstorm strata — a mind sectioned into glowing layers.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M20 34l30-14 30 14-30 14z" fill="#a855f7"/><path d="M20 52l30 14 30-14" fill="none" stroke="#7c3aed" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M20 68l30 14 30-14" fill="none" stroke="#2dd4bf" stroke-width="5"/></svg>
